text: This paper explores ChatGPT, a natural language processing (NLP) system that was released by Open AI in December 2022. The paper highlights the different features of ChatGPT, its advantages and its weaknesses. The paper also examines the applications of ChatGPT and its limitations. The paper finally concluded that ChatGPT is a very strong tool for NLP that can carry on conversations in a human manner, but it has some weaknesses that must be addressed.
explanation: The passage uses generic, boilerplate phrasing and contains a factual inaccuracy (Open AI vs OpenAI; December 2022 release), which are common cues of AI-generated text.
